name: playwright-testmo-starter
description: Production-ready Playwright + TypeScript boilerplate with POM, Page Factory, fixtures, and Testmo integration.

scripts.test:ci: sh -c 'npm run test; test_status=$?; if [ -n "$TESTMO_URL" ] && [ -n "$TESTMO_PROJECT_ID" ]; then npm run testmo:submit; submit_status=$?; else echo "Skipping Testmo submission: TESTMO_URL and TESTMO_PROJECT_ID must be set."; submit_status=0; fi; if [ $test_status -ne 0 ]; then exit $test_status; fi; exit $submit_status'
